data.title: Bitget has launched U-standard XPIN and UB perpetual contracts
data.description: According to an official announcement, Bitget has launched U-margined XPIN and UB perpetual contracts, both with a maximum leverage of 50x. Contract trading on BOT will also be available simultaneously.

data.title: Planet Evening News
data.description: 1. Magic Eden will launch SparkPad, a token launch platform; 2. Coinbase: DAT holds over 1 million BTC, and the market may continue to strengthen in the fourth quarter of this year; 3. ZachXBT: $1.2 million stolen from THORChain may belong to user @jpthor; 4. Bitcoin treasury company Smarter Web Company plans to seek inclusion in the FTSE 100 index and explore potential acquisitions; 5. Polymarket predicts that Chris Waller is the most likely candidate for Trump to announce the next Federal Reserve Chairman in 2025; 6. Ethena announced its withdrawal from the bidding for the Hyperliquid USDH stablecoin issuance.

data.title: USDC Treasury Burns Over 60 Million Tokens on Ethereum
data.description: According to BlockBeats, Whale Alert has reported that the USDC Treasury recently destroyed 60,876,255 USDC tokens on the Ethereum blockchain. This transaction, which occurred approximately two minutes ago, is valued at around $60,859,332.

data.title: 192,000 SOL redeemed from FTX/Alameda were distributed to 28 addresses
data.description: According to Ember Chain analyst Ember's monitoring, 15 minutes ago, the 192,000 SOL (worth $43.56 million) redeemed from staking by FTX/Alameda today has been distributed and transferred to 28 addresses.

data.title: A suspected Ethena-tagged address transferred 5 million ENA to Binance
data.description: Arkham monitoring data shows that a suspected Ethena-tagged address transferred 5 million ENA to Binance, worth $3.81 million. The address has transferred a total of 44 million ENA to Binance in the past two weeks.

data.title: New ModStealer malware targets crypto wallets across operating systems
data.description: Security firm Mosyle has discovered that the ModStealer malware is targeting cryptocurrency users on macOS, Windows, and Linux systems, stealing wallet private keys and login credentials. The malware remained undetected by major antivirus engines for nearly a month after being uploaded to VirusTotal. ModStealer is being spread through fake job ads, particularly targeting Web 3 developers. Once a user installs the malware package, the program embeds itself in the system's background, stealing clipboard data, taking screenshots, and executing remote commands. (Cointelegraph)

data.title: Solana's Strategic Moves May Be Underestimated by the Market
data.description:
According to PANews, the recent developments involving Multicoin Capital, Jump Trading, and Galaxy Digital in the Solana ecosystem may be undervalued by the market. Forward Industries, Inc., a Nasdaq-listed company with a market cap of under $60 million, has been injected with new operational business through PIPE private equity financing, minimizing its previous operational burdens.

Kyle Samani, a prominent advocate for Solana, has personally invested $25 million in the latest DAT initiative, signaling a significant commitment. Multicoin Capital, Jump Trading, and Galaxy Digital have deep ties with Solana. Multicoin has invested over $500 million in the ecosystem, while Jump Trading, a high-frequency trading firm, is involved in developing the Firedancer node and exploring the DFBA mechanism, providing market-making services. Galaxy Digital holds over $1 billion in SOL and has tokenized its stock on Solana, leveraging its global VC network and institutional resources.

The combination of narrative promotion, technological innovation, and resource accessibility forms a powerful triad. Solana's upcoming Alpenglow consensus and Firedancer client node diversity are expected to significantly enhance its performance, with previous mainnet tests achieving over 100,000 TPS and execution speeds reduced to under 150 milliseconds. The DFBA mechanism could potentially lead to groundbreaking new products on the Solana chain. A recent governance proposal, SIMD-228, which was rejected, could have reduced SOL's staking inflation yield, impacting institutional interest in the DAT narrative.

Solana's DAT narrative extends beyond the "micro-strategy" model of Bitcoin, Ethereum, and other altcoins, focusing on the entire ecosystem rather than just the token. The goal is to transition from a pure MEME chain to a new Internet Capital Markets (ICM) narrative, aligning with the trend of TradFi integration promoted by the U.S. crypto-friendly government.

The ICM narrative is expansive enough for Solana, encompassing MEME launchpads, DePIN, PayFi, and HFT Trading, positioning it as a significant player in the evolving financial landscape.

data.title: South Korea's BitPlanet acquires Bitcoin asset management firm SGA Co for $50 million
data.description: According to market news: South Korean institutional Bitcoin company BitPlanet has acquired Bitcoin asset management company SGA Co for $50 million, aiming to become the world's tenth largest Bitcoin asset management company. (BTCtreasuries)

data.title: Bitcoin's September Low May Signal Market Bottom, Historical Data Suggests
data.description:
According to PANews, historical data indicates that Bitcoin may have reached its lowest point for 2025 on September 1, with a low of approximately $107,000. Since July 2024, Bitcoin has typically formed its monthly low within the first ten days of each month. However, February, June, and August 2025 were exceptions, with lows occurring later, although the market experienced a pullback in the first ten days before resuming its trend. This pattern may be linked to institutional portfolio rebalancing and key macroeconomic events concentrated at the beginning of the month.

Data from CoinDesk and insights from Oliver Knight, Deputy Editor of Tokens, suggest that the expiration of several futures and options markets at the end of each month or the beginning of the next could trigger short-term volatility, leading to subdued trading activity as traders opt to roll over or reposition. While past performance does not guarantee future results, the fourth quarter has historically been Bitcoin's strongest period, with an average return rate of 85%. October is particularly notable, having only experienced declines in two months since 2013.

data.title: Lobby group calls for UK-US 'tech bridge' to include blockchain
data.description: On the eve of Trump's visit to the UK next week, several British trade groups are urging the government to include blockchain technology in any technological innovation cooperation agreement signed with the United States. A letter to the UK's business secretary shows that more than a dozen groups representing the financial, technology, and cryptocurrency industries said distributed ledger technology should be a "core component" of the so-called "UK-US Technology Bridge." Trump, who embraced crypto assets during his second term, will be accompanied on this state visit by a delegation of tech leaders, including OpenAI founder Sam Altman and Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang. Reports indicate that an agreement between the two countries will establish "complementary partnerships" in areas such as artificial intelligence and quantum computing. (Cointelegraph)

data.title: Morgan Stanley: We expect the Fed to cut interest rates by 25 basis points at each of its three meetings this year
data.description: Morgan Stanley expects the Fed to cut interest rates by 25 basis points at each of its three meetings this year, namely in January, April and July 2026, compared with previous forecasts of cuts in September and December.

data.title: THORSwap CEO: THORChain protocol has not been attacked
data.description: Regarding the theft of approximately $1.2 million from THORChain, THORSwap CEO Paper stated on the X platform that this was merely a bounty for the return of the stolen assets, and that THORChain and the THORSwap protocol had not been attacked.

data.title: Bybit Web3 24-hour market: 5 tokens surge over 30%, with WOJAK leading the gains with a 91% increase
data.description: According to Bybit Web 3's current "hot coin capture" data, Web 3 has performed well in the past 24 hours, with five popular coins recording significant gains: WOJAK up 91%, SPARK up 53%, CLIPPY up 48%, KORI up 35%, and retire up 30%.

data.title: Meliuz Launches Options-Based Bitcoin Strategy to Expand Reserves
data.description: Meliuz, a publicly listed Brazilian company, has unveiled a new Bitcoin acquisition strategy, using cash-backed options contracts to expand its existing holdings of over 600 Bitcoins. Meliuz will reportedly sell put options with a specific strike price. For example, if it sells an option contract with a strike price of $95,000, the company will earn premiums if the Bitcoin price is above that level at expiration. (Bitcoin.news)

data.title: Polygon Labs Partners with Cypher Capital to Enhance Institutional Access to POL
data.description: According to Foresight News, Polygon Labs, the core development team of the Polygon ecosystem, has announced a partnership with investment firm Cypher Capital. This collaboration aims to expand institutional investors' access to Polygon's native token, POL. Recently, Cypher Capital has acquired a significant amount of POL holdings and will work with Polygon Labs to develop structured strategies. These strategies are designed to provide institutional investors with investment opportunities, generate returns, and bolster the network's growth and security.
